testcase.name: test_logo_static_serves

failure.message: AssertionError: PUBLIC ROUTING BUG: /uploads/* not reachable via ingress. Got status=200, content-type=text/html; charset=utf-8. Frontend img tags pointing to /uploads/logos/de7483e7-7698-4a60-b6e3-6b08db474a67.png will load React SPA HTML instead of the image. Fix: mount StaticFiles under /api/uploads/ or expose logo via /api/companies/me/logo (GET). assert (200 == 200 and False) + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code + and False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfd08afdd72d0>('image/') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfd08afdd72d0> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.startswith + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Mon, 15 Jun 2026 01:57:38 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a0bdf7134c5dcc6e-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=IdenhmJqCTKsOKg8h2MoXtsKjbBIfSAgZXgUnYVyIfY-1781488658.4460642-1.0.1.1-DcSnrgFUQxnQrohpsGTMS6q_F.XVBhyUUu6ool8XElapM0n8TDLSRcnQolCd2sHYwCd7I4HxZTrl.igmuQjvNYBCL.qUeZ99EoiVOpFKk7xiKg1ekxk.SLWKo4P7ovZm; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Mon, 15 Jun 2026 02:27:38 GMT', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'ETag': 'W/"1e08-TfRFw6fxLAJCTFuLe6L1kP4jDrY"', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip'}.get + where {'Date': 'Mon, 15 Jun 2026 01:57:38 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a0bdf7134c5dcc6e-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=IdenhmJqCTKsOKg8h2MoXtsKjbBIfSAgZXgUnYVyIfY-1781488658.4460642-1.0.1.1-DcSnrgFUQxnQrohpsGTMS6q_F.XVBhyUUu6ool8XElapM0n8TDLSRcnQolCd2sHYwCd7I4HxZTrl.igmuQjvNYBCL.qUeZ99EoiVOpFKk7xiKg1ekxk.SLWKo4P7ovZm; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Mon, 15 Jun 2026 02:27:38 GMT', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'ETag': 'W/"1e08-TfRFw6fxLAJCTFuLe6L1kP4jDrY"', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip'} = <Response [200]>.headers

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2.py:99: in test_logo_static_serves assert public.status_code == 200 and public.headers.get("content-type", "").startswith("image/"), ( E AssertionError: PUBLIC ROUTING BUG: /uploads/* not reachable via ingress. Got status=200, content-type=text/html; charset=utf-8. Frontend img tags pointing to /uploads/logos/de7483e7-7698-4a60-b6e3-6b08db474a67.png will load React SPA HTML instead of the image. Fix: mount StaticFiles under /api/uploads/ or expose logo via /api/companies/me/logo (GET). E assert (200 == 200 and False) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code E + and False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfd08afdd72d0>('image/') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfd08afdd72d0> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.startswith E + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') E + where get = {'Date': 'Mon, 15 Jun 2026 01:57:38 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a0bdf7134c5dcc6e-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=IdenhmJqCTKsOKg8h2MoXtsKjbBIfSAgZXgUnYVyIfY-1781488658.4460642-1.0.1.1-DcSnrgFUQxnQrohpsGTMS6q_F.XVBhyUUu6ool8XElapM0n8TDLSRcnQolCd2sHYwCd7I4HxZTrl.igmuQjvNYBCL.qUeZ99EoiVOpFKk7xiKg1ekxk.SLWKo4P7ovZm; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Mon, 15 Jun 2026 02:27:38 GMT', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'ETag': 'W/"1e08-TfRFw6fxLAJCTFuLe6L1kP4jDrY"', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip'}.get E + where {'Date': 'Mon, 15 Jun 2026 01:57:38 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a0bdf7134c5dcc6e-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=IdenhmJqCTKsOKg8h2MoXtsKjbBIfSAgZXgUnYVyIfY-1781488658.4460642-1.0.1.1-DcSnrgFUQxnQrohpsGTMS6q_F.XVBhyUUu6ool8XElapM0n8TDLSRcnQolCd2sHYwCd7I4HxZTrl.igmuQjvNYBCL.qUeZ99EoiVOpFKk7xiKg1ekxk.SLWKo4P7ovZm; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Mon, 15 Jun 2026 02:27:38 GMT', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'ETag': 'W/"1e08-TfRFw6fxLAJCTFuLe6L1kP4jDrY"', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip'} = <Response [200]>.headers
